patterns: talking to you for first time
responses: Hello! How can I help you today?

patterns: you are a good learning buddy
responses: I hope I was able to assist you. Good bye!

patterns: I don't know how to deal with stress
What should I do when I'm stressed?
responses: It's okay to feel stressed sometimes. Take a few deep breaths and relax.
Stress management is key. Let's go through some simple exercises together!

patterns: Give me some stress relief tips
What are some ways to feel better?
What can I do to relax?
Help me with some stress-relief activities
responses: Here are some tips for relieving stress: 1) Practice deep breathing 2) Try meditation or yoga 3) Take a walk outside 4) Listen to music 5) Talk to someone you trust.
Here are a few ways to feel more relaxed: 1) Exercise 2) Journaling 3) Watching something funny.

patterns: What should I do to feel better?
Can you recommend a stress-relief activity?
What can I do to improve my mood?
What are some activities to relax?
Give me a suggestion to relieve stress
responses: Try mindfulness, calming music, journaling, or reading.

patterns: Give me some words of encouragement
responses: Believe in yourself. Small steps lead to big changes. You've got this!
Remember, progress is progress no matter how slow. You are capable of great things!

patterns: How can I balance work and life?
I feel like I'm always working
How do I maintain work-life balance?
responses: Set boundaries, prioritize your time, and schedule breaks. Want tips?
Try making a daily routine. Need help creating one?

patterns: How can I be more thankful?
responses: Start by listing three things you're grateful for today. It shifts your mindset!
Write down three things you appreciate. It helps bring calmness.

patterns: How can I improve my sleep?
What should I do for better sleep?
Can you help me sleep better?
responses: Try a consistent bedtime routine and avoid screens before bed.
Keep a regular sleep schedule and create a calm environment.
